overview: Everything funnels into one GoHighLevel pipeline — Patient Acquisition — which is the single source of truth for every lead regardless of source. The team works one board daily; automations move leads forward wherever there is a reliable signal (form submit, relo tag, booking webhook, appointment status), and the team manually handles the few judgment steps (logging the 3-month value, marking Lost). Four sources feed it: website form fills, Patient Prism relo (reload) call leads, Patient Prism general call events, and Modento online bookings.
oneLineSummary: Every lead — website, Patient Prism call, relo, or online booking — lands in one pipeline and moves itself forward until the appointment is completed; staff only log the 3-month value and mark Lost.
goals: Replace the practice's spreadsheet with a single GHL pipeline that captures every lead source, surfaces high-value reload leads in a Qualified stage with an alert and the call's dollar value, nurtures leads to book online, and tracks conversion quality end to end.
maintenanceNotes: Relo sync is a standalone Python cron service (runs ~daily) that reads Patient Prism and writes to the GHL Contacts API; env vars: PATIENT_PRISM_TOKEN, GHL_TOKEN, GHL_LOCATION_ID. GHL token needs contacts.write + locations/customFields.readonly. The sync's SQLite state DB is production data — back it up. Online bookings depend on a GTM container (capture tag + send tag, secret-validated webhook); changes must be published. Meta CAPI fires from the call-events workflow for ad optimization. Increase the cron frequency if near-real-time relos are required.

leadSources.label: Website form fills
leadSources.fires: Internal team email + task to the practice owner; UTM source tagging
leadSources.tagsApplied: Website, source UTM tags (Meta / Google / paid / none)
leadSources.notes: Branches by ad source before creating the opportunity.

leadSources.label: Patient Prism reload (relo) leads
leadSources.entryMechanism: Python cron sync → GHL Contacts API upsert (dedup by phone), then tag added as a separate call
leadSources.fires: Meta CAPI, internal relo alert, task to the practice owner
leadSources.handlingWorkflow: A1 - Patient Prism Relo Leads (to Qualified)
leadSources.notes: Trigger MUST be 'tag added: new-opportunity' because the sync adds the tag after the contact upsert; a contact-created trigger would miss it. Opportunity value is set from the synced dollar-value custom field.

leadSources.label: Patient Prism general call events
leadSources.handlingWorkflow: IN2 - Patient Prism Call Conversion Events (non-relo)
leadSources.entryStage: Routes by tag (New Lead – Unqualified / Appointment Booked / First Appointment Completed)
leadSources.notes: Separate path from the relo cron. Call-disqualified leads stay as contacts only, not in the pipeline.

leadSources.label: Modento online bookings
leadSources.entryMechanism: Browser-side Google Tag Manager capture → GHL inbound webhook (secret-validated) on the 'Scheduled appointment' event
leadSources.fires: Create opportunity; suppression tag to exit nurtures
leadSources.handlingWorkflow: REC1 - Modento Booking to GHL (Appointment Booked)
leadSources.notes: Record-keeping: the patient already converted by booking, so no patient comms are sent here. GHL holds the opportunity, not a calendar appointment — by design.

pipelineStages.name: New Lead – Unqualified
pipelineStages.description: A fresh lead that still needs to be qualified.
pipelineStages.entryCondition: Website form fills; generic Patient Prism call contacts.

manualActions.description: Team calls to qualify the lead.

pipelineStages.name: Qualified Lead
pipelineStages.description: A Patient Prism reload lead — should have booked but didn't; worth calling back.
pipelineStages.entryCondition: Relo sync tag 'new-opportunity'; also a cancelled appointment drops back here.

manualActions.description: Call the reload lead back while the call is fresh.

pipelineStages.name: Appointment Booked
pipelineStages.entryCondition: Modento online booking; Patient Prism 'booked'; a no-show stays here for rebooking.

pipelineStages.name: Scheduled
pipelineStages.entryCondition: Appointment status = confirmed (auto via the appointment-confirmed workflow).

pipelineStages.name: First Appointment Completed
pipelineStages.description: Patient attended their first visit; initial value logged.
pipelineStages.entryCondition: Appointment status = showed (auto via sync-tag workflow); Patient Prism 'showed'.

pipelineStages.name: 3-Month Value Completed
pipelineStages.description: True patient value known after follow-up work (crowns, extractions, etc.).
pipelineStages.entryCondition: Manual team move ~2–3 months later once the PMS reflects the true value.

manualActions.description: Update the opportunity with the true 3-month patient value.

pipelineStages.name: Spam
pipelineStages.description: Bad / disqualified lead (Medicaid-only, junk) kept for clean conversion reporting.
pipelineStages.entryCondition: Auto via the invalid-tag workflow; or manual.

manualActions.description: Mark the opportunity Lost when the deal is dead.

stageTransitions.notes: Entry for reload leads, plus alert + task.
Handled by the showed sync-tag workflow.

stageTransitions.trigger: Team logs true value ~2–3 months later

stageTransitions.notes: Drops back so the booking-push nurture re-engages.
Routes invalid leads for clean reporting.

calendars.name: Online booking page (new-patient & emergency)
calendars.purpose: Books new-patient visits ($199 new-patient special) and emergency exams ($59) — the single booking page embedded in every nurture.
calendars.onBooking: GTM tag POSTs to the GHL inbound webhook → create opportunity in Appointment Booked; apply suppression tag so 'please book' nurtures stop.
calendars.reminders: Handled in Modento / Dental Intelligence (the system of record for scheduling).
calendars.notes: GHL does not hold a calendar appointment for online bookings by design; the booking is captured as the conversion and later stages are moved manually.

externalIntegrations.name: Patient Prism (relo sync)
externalIntegrations.dataObjects: contacts, AI call summary, opportunity dollar value, call recording URL, lead sentiment, agent sentiment
externalIntegrations.purpose: Push only true reload leads into GHL and enrich the contact so the relo surfaces in Qualified with its dollar value.
externalIntegrations.notes: Standalone Python service; upserts by phone then adds the 'new-opportunity' tag as a separate call.

externalIntegrations.name: Patient Prism (call events)
externalIntegrations.dataObjects: contacts, call event type (booked / showed / no-show / follow-up)
externalIntegrations.purpose: Route general call outcomes into the pipeline and fire Meta CAPI.
externalIntegrations.notes: Separate from the relo cron path.

externalIntegrations.name: Modento / Dental Intelligence
externalIntegrations.dataObjects: contacts (name, phone, email, DOB), booking event
externalIntegrations.purpose: Capture online bookings as conversions in GHL.
externalIntegrations.notes: Delivered via Google Tag Manager browser tags; secret-validated webhook.

externalIntegrations.name: Meta Conversion API
externalIntegrations.purpose: Feed conversions back to Meta so ads can optimize for sales-qualified leads.
externalIntegrations.notes: Fires from the call-events workflow; expand once API-qualified-lead data is available.

workflows.name: Website Form Leads
workflows.whatItDoes: Branches by UTM source, tags the source, updates fields, creates the opportunity in New Lead – Unqualified.

workflows.name: Patient Prism Relo Leads (to Qualified)
workflows.whatItDoes: Creates the opportunity in Qualified Lead with the synced dollar value, fires Meta CAPI, sends the relo alert and a task to the owner.

workflows.name: Patient Prism Call Conversion Events (non-relo)
workflows.whatItDoes: Creates the contact then routes by tag into the right stage; fires Meta CAPI.

workflows.name: Modento Booking to GHL
workflows.whatItDoes: Creates the contact and the opportunity in Appointment Booked; applies the suppression tag.

workflows.name: Unqualified Lead Nurture
workflows.whatItDoes: Welcome email then a multi-step nurture with a 'Book your appointment' CTA driving to the online booking page.

workflows.name: Qualified Lead Booking Push
workflows.whatItDoes: SMS + email with the booking link to push reload leads to rebook.

workflows.name: Appointment Confirmed to Scheduled
workflows.whatItDoes: Tags and moves the opportunity to Scheduled (status open).

workflows.name: No Show Recovery
workflows.whatItDoes: Recovery nurture; keeps the opportunity in Appointment Booked for rebooking.

workflows.name: Post Visit Reviews and Referrals
workflows.whatItDoes: Thank-you email, then a review request and a referral ask.

workflows.name: Internal Team Notification
workflows.whatItDoes: Internal email to front desk + a task to the practice owner.

workflows.name: Sync Cancelled Tag
workflows.whatItDoes: Adds the tag and moves the opportunity back to Qualified Lead to re-engage.

workflows.name: Sync Showed Tag
workflows.whatItDoes: Adds the tag and moves the opportunity to First Appointment Completed.

workflows.name: Sync Invalid Tag
workflows.whatItDoes: Adds the tag and moves the opportunity to Spam.

workflows.name: Sync No-Show Tag
workflows.whatItDoes: Adds the 'no-show' tag (which triggers No Show Recovery).

workflows.name: Booking-Link Click Qualifier
workflows.whatItDoes: Tags and updates the opportunity as a hot engagement signal.

workflows.name: Lead Reply to Team Alert
workflows.whatItDoes: Tags and sends an internal alert so the team jumps on engaged leads.

workflows.name: Global Exits and Suppression
workflows.whatItDoes: Removes the contact from active nurtures to prevent over-messaging.

customFields.description: AI call summary from Patient Prism.
Practice phone line for merge fields.
Google review URL for post-visit review CTAs.
Referral credit shown in the referral email.
Current promotion name used in nurtures.

tags.meaning: Reload lead identified by Patient Prism (triggers the relo workflow).
Source tag for any Patient Prism call contact.

preLaunchItems.description: Populate google_reviews_link with the practice's Google review URL (review CTAs are dead until then).
Set referral_incentive_amount and fix the referral email placeholder text + the 'Refer a friend' button destination.
Confirm the online-booking workflow applies a suppression tag so booked patients stop receiving 'please book' nurtures.
Verify the dedup rule (email first, then phone) in settings before heavy live traffic.
Decide the relo sync cadence (daily vs hourly) to match the 'call within ~10 min' expectation.
Confirm whether the engagement utilities (booking-link click qualifier, SMS reply handler) should be live or draft.
Throttle the Performance Max ad campaigns driving low-quality leads.
Deliver team training and run an end-to-end live test (form, relo, booking, status changes).

tasks.title: Build relo intake on tag 'new-opportunity' into Qualified Lead with alert + task
tasks.description: Trigger on tag added (not contact-created); create the opportunity in Qualified Lead, set value from pp_opportunity_value, fire Meta CAPI, send the alert and a task to the owner.

tasks.title: Wire website form intake to New Lead – Unqualified with UTM branching
tasks.description: Branch by UTM source, tag the source, create the opportunity, and trigger the internal notification + task.

tasks.title: Configure the Modento → GHL inbound webhook with secret validation
tasks.description: Validate the shared secret, create the contact + opportunity in Appointment Booked, and apply the suppression tag.

tasks.title: Publish the nurtures and the suppression workflow
tasks.description: Publish the unqualified nurture, the qualified booking push, and global exits/suppression so booked leads stop receiving 'please book' messages.

tasks.title: Build the appointment-status sync-tag workflows
tasks.description: Turn appointment statuses (confirmed/cancelled/showed/invalid/no-show) into tags and the matching stage moves.

tasks.title: Embed the booking link with both services in every nurture email
tasks.description: Use the calendar_link custom value so the $199 new-patient and $59 emergency offers are present and changeable in one place.

gaps.question: What is the practice's Google review URL for google_reviews_link?
gaps.rationale: Post-visit review CTAs render a dead link until this value is set.

gaps.question: What referral incentive amount should the referral email show, and where should the 'Refer a friend' button point?
gaps.rationale: The referral email currently has placeholder text and the button points at the booking page — a logic mismatch that would reach patients.

gaps.question: Does the online-booking workflow apply a suppression tag that the global-exits workflow listens for?
gaps.rationale: Without it, a patient who books online keeps getting 'please book' nurtures.

gaps.question: Should the Patient Prism relo cron run more frequently than daily?
gaps.rationale: The team expects reload leads within ~10 minutes; a daily cron batches them once per day.

gaps.question: Which Meta conversion events should be sent for sales-qualified-lead optimization, and is the GHL V2 API auth/scope set up for it?
gaps.rationale: Ads are driving low-quality leads; feeding qualified-lead conversions back is what lets Meta optimize.

gaps.question: Should call recordings / phone numbers be attached to the GHL contact, or stay in Patient Prism?
gaps.rationale: Owner decision affecting where staff review call context.

gaps.question: Confirm 'Spam' as the disqualified-lead stage name and the 2–3 month value-review protocol.
gaps.rationale: Naming and the manual 3-month move need an owner to confirm the cadence.
